title: Flint Flamer GUI
description: The Classic Flamer GUI (Animated and Burning just the way you like it :D)
body:
resourcepack by: _FlorFlamer_
___
![Flint Flamer gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31327a9d1d6d69a3f4cf19653d2aa501d73b5432.png)
![Packs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83be81680a7fdb33fe3cdb110f9dd284b67cdedf.png)

## ※ Information:

A warm, shiny bar that will organize your evenings. PS: she doesn't...

Animations for every detail of the bar have been added to make it more eye-catching  ͡° ͜ʖ  ͡°

> 💔 Heart | Cute Flames ✍(◔◡◔)
> 
> ⬛ Bar | Black bar with flames in the background
> 
> 🔳 Select | Little Flamer barred in gold
> 
> 🔋 XP Bar | Flaming XP Bar
> 
> 🍗 Food | Animated
___

## ↈ FAQ:

### 💫 | Problems...

<details>
<summary>Animations are not working</summary>

This could be happening because the version of minecraft doesn't support animations (this usually only happens with versions before 1.20.1).

An option called “🔥 OLD VERSIONS READY” has been added to the versions tab.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Gui not showing up Well our in general</summary>

Some time ago (in version 1.20.2) Mojang had the idea of changing the location of the folders, that's the problem...

An option called “🔥 OLD VERSIONS READY” has been added to the versions tab.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Mod not supported</summary>

This texture pack alters the base of only a few mod textures, so in order to modify a specific mod, Floros will have to study the mod's base files, modify them and add them to the Resource Pack.

If you have any mods that you'd like me to modify to add to the Resource Pack, try connecting them to me.

</details>


___

- Redistribute this resource pack
